title: Spectrophotometric determination of cadmium(II) and Iead(II) using 5,5-dimethyl-1,3-cyclohexanedione bisthiosemicarbazone monohydrochloride
author: C. S. Devaragudi
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry, Sri Krishnadevaraya University, Anantapur-515 003, Andhra Pradesh, India 

  Manuscript received 28 April 2006, accepted 6 June 2006  

 The reagent, 5,5-dimethyl-1,3-cyclohexanedione bi.sthiosemicarbazone monohydrochloride (5,5-DiMe-1,3-CHDT.HCI) gives orange red coloured complexes with cadmium(ll) and lead(II) in ammonium chloride-ammonium hydroxide buffer medium. The molar absorptivilles of cadmium and lead complexes respectively arc 2.5 x 10 4  and 1.52 x 10 4  L mol -1  cm -1 .These color reactions have been investigated to develop spectrophotometric methods for the determination or cadmium(II) and lead(ll) in aqueous medium.The reagent Is used for the determination of cadmium in biological samples.

The molar absorptivilles of cadmium and lead complexes respectively arc 2.5 x 10 4  and 1.52 x 10 4  L mol -1  cm -1 .These color reactions have been investigated to develop spectrophotometric methods for the determination or cadmium(II) and lead(ll) in aqueous medium.The reagent Is used for the determination of cadmium in biological samples.
